comment.body:
"As always, my call is April-May, late spring correction.
This one wasn’t big, it is just the geo risk. After March 16-18 we will most likely past the heatest part of Iran, then calm down into summer, and a new more vicious wave into late autumn, fron geo front."

KISS question from me, if late spring correction, doesn't that conflict with calm down into summer?
